00003 #include <lib.h>

00027 static
00028 int
00029 tryattach_emu_to_lamebus(int devunit, struct lamebus_softc *bus, int busunit)
00030 {
00031         struct emu_softc *dev;
00032         int result;
00033 
00034         dev = attach_emu_to_lamebus(devunit, bus);
00035         if (dev==NULL) {
00036                 return -1;
00037         }
00038         kprintf("emu%d at lamebus%d", devunit, busunit);
00039         result = config_emu(dev, devunit);
00040         if (result != 0) {
00041                 kprintf(": %s\n", strerror(result));
00042                 /* should really clean up dev */
00043                 return result;
00044         }
00045         kprintf("\n");
00046         nextunit_emu = devunit+1;
00047         autoconf_emu(dev, devunit);
00048         return 0;
00049 }
00050

00276 void
00277 autoconf_lser(struct lser_softc *bus, int busunit)
00278 {
00279         (void)bus; (void)busunit;
00280         {
00281                 if (nextunit_con <= 0) {
00282                         tryattach_con_to_lser(0, bus, busunit);
00283                 }
00284         }
00285 }

00310 autoconf_ltimer(struct ltimer_softc *bus, int busunit)
00311 {
00312         (void)bus; (void)busunit;
00313         {
00314                 if (nextunit_beep <= 0) {
00315                         tryattach_beep_to_ltimer(0, bus, busunit);
00316                 }
00317         }
00318         {
00319                 if (nextunit_rtclock <= 0) {
00320                         tryattach_rtclock_to_ltimer(0, bus, busunit);
00321                 }
00322         }
00323 }
00324 
00325 void
00326 autoconf_lamebus(struct lamebus_softc *bus, int busunit)
00327 {
00328         (void)bus; (void)busunit;
00329         {
00330                 int result, devunit=nextunit_emu;
00331                 do {
00332                         result = tryattach_emu_to_lamebus(devunit, bus, busunit);
00333                         devunit++;
00334                 } while (result==0);
00335         }
00336         {
00337                 int result, devunit=nextunit_ltrace;
00338                 do {
00339                         result = tryattach_ltrace_to_lamebus(devunit, bus, busunit);
00340                         devunit++;
00341                 } while (result==0);
00342         }
00343         {
00344                 int result, devunit=nextunit_ltimer;
00345                 do {
00346                         result = tryattach_ltimer_to_lamebus(devunit, bus, busunit);
00347                         devunit++;
00348                 } while (result==0);
00349         }
00350         {
00351                 int result, devunit=nextunit_lrandom;
00352                 do {
00353                         result = tryattach_lrandom_to_lamebus(devunit, bus, busunit);
00354                         devunit++;
00355                 } while (result==0);
00356         }
00357         {
00358                 int result, devunit=nextunit_lhd;
00359                 do {
00360                         result = tryattach_lhd_to_lamebus(devunit, bus, busunit);
00361                         devunit++;
00362                 } while (result==0);
00363         }
00364         {
00365                 int result, devunit=nextunit_lser;
00366                 do {
00367                         result = tryattach_lser_to_lamebus(devunit, bus, busunit);
00368                         devunit++;
00369                 } while (result==0);
00370         }
00371 }
